full_text:
Gan Shu 甘述
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gan Shu (甘述)was born in Nanyang. Gained rank in the Secretariat despite his brother’s exile. Gan Shu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
